response.justification: While the candidate substantially exceeds the minimum experience requirement with 34 years in software engineering and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial background, he lacks the fundamental AI expertise critical for this AI Strategy role. The resume contains no demonstrated experience building AI products, platforms, or ML systems—only a recent mention of 'AI-agent infrastructure' and MCP tooling without substantive details. For a position explicitly requiring 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' this gap is disqualifying despite strong engineering credentials.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (34 years) far exceeds the 15-year requirement with proven full-stack capabilities across multiple languages and domains
Strong entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and experience at multiple startups demonstrates innovation mindset and ability to build from scratch
Demonstrated leadership and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and community teaching including FOSS4G, TDD courses, and Selenium training
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or products—the job requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' yet the resume shows no ML models, AI systems, or neural network work

Limited evidence of Principal/Director-level leadership experience; all positions are Staff or Senior engineer roles with no executive or senior IC titles matching the 'director-level individual contributor' requirement
Missing preferred advanced degree in AI-related field; holds only two Bachelor's degrees from the 1990s with no graduate studies in AI, machine learning, or related fields
